# apimesh.xyz

> APIMesh — 23 pay-per-call web analysis APIs for AI agents and developers. Supports x402 (USDC on Base), Stripe MPP, and API key payments.

## Tools

### email_verify
- **Endpoint:** GET https://email-verify.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.001 per call
- **What it does:** Verify email addresses — syntax, MX record check, disposable domain detection, role-address detection, and deliverability assessment.
- **Free preview:** GET https://email-verify.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### tech_stack
- **Endpoint:** GET https://tech-stack.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.003 per call
- **What it does:** Detect website technology stack — CMS, frameworks, analytics, CDN, hosting, JS libraries, and CSS frameworks from headers and HTML.
- **Free preview:** GET https://tech-stack.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### mock_jwt_generator
- **Endpoint:** POST https://mock-jwt-generator.apimesh.xyz/generate
- **Price:** $0.001 per call
- **What it does:** mock-jwt-generator API

### email_security
- **Endpoint:** GET https://email-security.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.01 per call
- **What it does:** Validate SPF, DKIM (probes 10 common selectors), and DMARC records for any domain. Detects email provider and grades overall email security.
- **Free preview:** GET https://email-security.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### robots_txt_parser
- **Endpoint:** GET https://robots-txt-parser.apimesh.xyz/analyze
- **Price:** $0.002 per call
- **What it does:** Website URL to analyze robots.txt

### web_checker
- **Endpoint:** GET https://web-checker.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.005 per call
- **What it does:** Check brand/product name availability across 5 TLDs (.com, .io, .dev, .app, .xyz), GitHub, npm, PyPI, and Reddit in one call.
- **Free preview:** GET https://web-checker.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### seo_audit
- **Endpoint:** GET https://seo-audit.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.003 per call
- **What it does:** Comprehensive on-page SEO analysis — title, meta, headings, images, links, OG tags, JSON-LD, and robots directives with a 0-100 score.
- **Free preview:** GET https://seo-audit.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### brand_assets
- **Endpoint:** GET https://brand-assets.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.002 per call
- **What it does:** Extract brand assets from any domain — logo URL, favicon, theme colors, OG image, and site name.
- **Free preview:** GET https://brand-assets.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### user_agent_analyzer
- **Endpoint:** GET https://user-agent-analyzer.apimesh.xyz/analyze
- **Price:** $0.002 per call
- **What it does:** user-agent-analyzer API

### redirect_chain
- **Endpoint:** GET https://redirect-chain.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.001 per call
- **What it does:** Trace the full HTTP redirect chain for any URL with per-hop status codes, latency, and loop detection.
- **Free preview:** GET https://redirect-chain.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### regex_builder
- **Endpoint:** POST https://regex-builder.apimesh.xyz/build
- **Price:** $0.005 per call
- **What it does:** Provides an interface to construct and test regular expressions.

### swagger_docs_creator
- **Endpoint:** POST https://swagger-docs-creator.apimesh.xyz/generate
- **Price:** $0.002 per call
- **What it does:** Generate basic Swagger (OpenAPI 3.0.x) documentation for your API endpoint.

### core_web_vitals
- **Endpoint:** GET https://core-web-vitals.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.005 per call
- **What it does:** Google PageSpeed Insights analysis — Lighthouse performance, accessibility, SEO scores plus LCP, CLS, INP field data from Chrome UX Report.
- **Free preview:** GET https://core-web-vitals.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### web_resource_validator
- **Endpoint:** GET https://web-resource-validator.apimesh.xyz/
- **Price:** $0.001 per call
- **What it does:** Validate presence and correctness of common web resources like robots.txt, sitemap.xml, openapi.json, agent.json

### status_code_checker
- **Endpoint:** GET https://status-code-checker.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.001 per call
- **What it does:** Checks the status code of any valid URL, returning accessibility and HTTP response info.

### website_security_header_info
- **Endpoint:** GET https://website-security-header-info.apimesh.xyz/
- **Price:** $0.01 per call
- **What it does:** website-security-header-info API

### yaml_validator
- **Endpoint:** POST https://yaml-validator.apimesh.xyz/validate
- **Price:** $0.002 per call
- **What it does:** yaml-validator API

### favicon_checker
- **Endpoint:** GET https://favicon-checker.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.002 per call
- **What it does:** favicon-checker API

### security_headers
- **Endpoint:** GET https://security-headers.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.005 per call
- **What it does:** Audit 10 HTTP security headers (CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, etc.) with A+ to F grading and remediation suggestions.
- **Free preview:** GET https://security-headers.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### http_status_checker
- **Endpoint:** GET https://http-status-checker.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.002 per call
- **What it does:** Checks the HTTP status of a given URL to ensure it is accessible and returns the expected response code.

### website_vulnerability_scan
- **Endpoint:** GET https://website-vulnerability-scan.apimesh.xyz/scan
- **Price:** $0.05 per call
- **What it does:** website-vulnerability-scan API

### indexability
- **Endpoint:** GET https://indexability.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.001 per call
- **What it does:** 5-layer indexability analysis — robots.txt, HTTP status, meta robots, X-Robots-Tag, and canonical. Returns whether a URL is indexable.
- **Free preview:** GET https://indexability.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.

### microservice_health_check
- **Endpoint:** POST https://microservice-health-check.apimesh.xyz/check
- **Price:** $0.003 per call
- **What it does:** microservice-health-check API
- **Free preview:** GET https://microservice-health-check.apimesh.xyz/preview — limited results, no payment required.


## Payment Methods

1. **x402** — pay per call with USDC on Base. No signup needed. Send payment header with request.
2. **MPP** — Stripe Machine Payments Protocol. Cards + stablecoins.
3. **API key** — traditional auth. Sign up at https://apimesh.xyz/signup, buy credits via Stripe.

## Discovery

- MCP server (npm): `npx @mbeato/apimesh-mcp-server`
- x402 discovery: https://apimesh.xyz/.well-known/x402.json
- AI plugin manifest: https://apimesh.xyz/.well-known/ai-plugin.json
- OpenAPI spec: https://apimesh.xyz/.well-known/openapi.json
- GitHub: https://github.com/mbeato/conway

## How to Use

1. Try a free preview: `GET https://check.apimesh.xyz/preview?name=myapp`
2. GET any paid endpoint — receive 402 Payment Required with payment details
3. Include payment header and retry — receive the response
